question: List the customers' first name, middle initial, last name and payment methods.
sql: SELECT Customers.customer_first_name, Customers.customer_middle_initial, Customers.customer_last_name, Customer_Payment_Methods.payment_method_code FROM Customers INNER JOIN Customer_Payment_Methods ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Payment_Methods.customer_id;

semantic.reason: 目标表未明确连接关系，可能导致支付方式与客户信息无法正确关联。
